page.title: Subagent Orchestration
page.subtitle: The main agent can use its own tools directly, or delegate tasks to subagents to complete more complex tasks and avoid excessive context length.

switches.dedupeHint: Remove duplicate tools from the main agent that overlap with subagents

description.enabled: Subagents will be placed in the main agent's tool set as tools, and the main agent will call subagents at appropriate times to complete tasks.

section.title: Static Subagent Configuration
section.subtitle: Configure delegatable static subagents, personas, and descriptions for the main agent
section.enhancedSettingsHint: Configure runtime parameters, resource limits, and tool strategies for dynamic subagents

cards.previewTitle: Preview: handoff tools seen by main LLM
cards.previewHint: Shows a preview of the currently selected Persona for easy confirmation of handoff targets.

form.nameHint: Use lowercase letters and underscores, globally unique
form.providerHint: Leave empty to follow the global default provider.
form.personaHint: The SubAgent inherits the selected Persona's system settings and tools.
form.silentHandoffHint: Let this SubAgent complete delegated tasks in the background while the main agent still reads the result and replies to users. Users will not see the SubAgent tool call or raw result unless the main LLM explicitly uses normal mode.
form.descriptionLabel: Description for the main LLM (used to decide handoff)
form.descriptionHint: Shown to the main LLM as the transfer_to_* tool description—keep it short and clear.

messages.unsavedChangesNotice: There are unsaved changes on this page. Please save before leaving.
messages.unsavedChangesLeaveConfirm: There are unsaved changes. Leaving will discard these changes. Continue?
messages.unsavedChangesReloadConfirm: There are unsaved changes. Refreshing will discard these changes. Continue?
messages.nameMissing: A subagent is missing a name
messages.nameInvalid: Invalid subagent name: only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed, must start with a letter
messages.namePattern: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores allowed

routerSystemPrompt.label: Router System Prompt
routerSystemPrompt.hint: The main agent's routing prompt, used to guide the main agent in recognizing user intent and delegating tasks to subagents. Only effective when dynamic subagents are not enabled.

historyEnabled.label: Enable History Memory
historyEnabled.hint: Enable subagent context history. When on, subagents retain memory across multiple conversation turns.

empty.title: No Subagents Configured
empty.subtitle: Add a new subagent to get started

enhancedSwitches.enableHint: Enable dynamic subagent creation and management. When enabled, the main LLM can dynamically create subagents at runtime using create_subagent tools. Can coexist with static subagent orchestration.
enhancedSwitches.autoCleanupHint: Automatically clean up unprotected dynamic subagents after each conversation turn
enhancedSwitches.sharedContextHint: Enable shared context between subagents. Subagents can communicate via send_shared_context tools.

enhancedFields.maxSubagentCountHint: Set the maximum number of subagents. Dynamic subagent count = Max subagent count - Existing static subagent count
enhancedFields.sharedContextMaxlenHint: Maximum number of messages in shared context
enhancedFields.subagentHistoryMaxlenHint: Maximum history messages retained per subagent
enhancedFields.executionTimeoutHint: Maximum execution timeout for subagent tasks, -1 means unlimited
enhancedFields.rulePromptHint: Fixed behavior constraints injected into dynamic subagents. Uses default rules when empty.
enhancedFields.timePromptEnabledHint: Inject current time into subagent system prompts

enhancedSection.runtimeParamsHint: Control subagent count, history, and execution timeout
enhancedSection.toolStrategyHint: Control which tools subagents can use

enhancedTools.blacklistHint: Tools that subagents cannot use. Blacklisted tools will not be assigned to subagents.
enhancedTools.inherentHint: Tools inherent to subagents. Tools in this list are guaranteed to be assigned to subagents.
enhancedTools.selectOrInputTool: Select or type a tool name
